pokemon:meltan.name: Meltan
pokemon:meltan.summary: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.
It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.
They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve.
It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.
